# Decision: Task ID — Application-Generated UUID

**Date**: 2026-04-14 **Scenarios**: 3.1, 3.2

"No nulls in domain" rule — DB auto-increment ID doesn't exist until after persistence.

| Rejected | Why |
|----------|-----|
| Pass components to storage port | Task becomes read-only, no factory methods |
| Sentinel 0L | Magic value, "not yet real" state |
| TaskId wrapping Optional | Over-engineered, sentinel in disguise |

**Chosen**: UUID generated by domain at creation time.

## Model

- `Task` — `UUID id`, `Title title`, `Description description`, `int position`, `Instant createdAt`
- `Task.create(Title, Description, int)` — `UUID.randomUUID()`, `Instant.now()`
- All-args constructor for reconstitution from storage
- DB: `UUID` column type (H2 native)
